label: Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs

node.label: Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs
node.definition: Neural ODEs, controlled differential equations, and neural SDEs parameterize continuous-time dynamics and place numerical solvers inside the learned computation.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs is modeled as depending on Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers, State-space transitions and feeding downstream nodes such as Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins.
examples: atlas downstream link to Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
limitations: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers, State-space transitions.

dependencies.rationale: Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.
Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component State-space transitions.
Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs consumes, emits, or organizes information using Sequences, events & time series.
